mapper.select: SELECT c.*, COUNT(r.id) AS relicCount FROM cultural_relic_category c LEFT JOIN cultural_relic r ON c.id = r.category_id WHERE c.id = #{id} GROUP BY c.id, c.category_name, c.parent_id, c.sort_order, c.description, c.create_time, c.update_time
SELECT * FROM cultural_relic_category WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT c.*, COUNT(r.id) AS relicCount FROM cultural_relic_category c LEFT JOIN cultural_relic r ON c.id = r.category_id GROUP BY c.id, c.category_name, c.parent_id, c.sort_order, c.description, c.create_time, c.update_time ORDER BY c.parent_id ASC, c.sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cultural_relic_category (category_name, parent_id, sort_order, description, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{categoryName}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder}, #{description}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
